findings.evidence: `find code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic -maxdepth 1 -name '*Squarefree*.lean'` only finds `CoprimeSquarefree.lean`; `rg -n "not_isSquare_of_squarefree_of_not_isUnit|TauCeti\.NumberTheory\.Multiquadratic\.Squarefree" code roadmap` has no surviving alias/import, while `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Squarefree.lean:22` defines only `Squarefree.not_isSquare`.
findings.fix: Keep a compatibility module at this path that publicly imports `TauCeti.Algebra.Squarefree` and provides a deprecated alias/wrapper for the old theorem name.
findings.issue: Deleting the public module and `TauCeti.Multiquadratic.not_isSquare_of_squarefree_of_not_isUnit` breaks downstream imports and callers even though the functionality was only renamed/moved.

summary: The new `Squarefree.not_isSquare` API is appropriately small, but the PR removes the previous public module and declaration without a compatibility path.
